description: TAM pgd_delta sweep: pgd_delta=2.0, pgd_step_size≈0.667 (delta/mining_opt_steps). All else fixed: anchor_step=2, mining_opt_steps=3, gc_loss. Larger PGD radius than q220 baseline. Expects negatives farther from x_pos, larger neg_dist. May improve robustness or diverge. SUCCESS: val_mse < 0.00975 and anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
notes: TAM pgd_delta=2.0 variant. Larger PGD radius: negatives generated ~2.0 from x_pos (vs q220's ~1.5). May challenge model more or risk divergence. Key diagnostic: neg_dist should be ~2.0 from x_pos.
